title: Polaris animation for punchy（北极星）
description:
一个基于punchy模组的资源包
让你的剑拥有类似《三角洲行动》中武器「北极星」的动画。
A resource pack based on the Punchy mod that gives your sword animations similar to the "Polaris" weapon from Delta Force.
body:
**一个基于punchy模组的资源包**  
**让你的剑拥有类似《三角洲行动》中武器「北极星」的动画。**  
**A resource pack based on the Punchy mod that gives your sword animations similar to the "Polaris" weapon from Delta Force.**  
![inspect animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b4214973f82fea7225c3b876d7d87394d836f8.gif)
(我可太爱这个了)  
(I absolutely love this!)  
![attack animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f223b58502ff170a6d2dc73bef9fba08fda12ff8.gif) 
(三段攻击，包含不同的收刀动画)  
(Three-stage attack, with different sheathing animations for each stage)
